meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-07-15 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: A long, early night after Tuesday's lift: 8h42 at score 73 off a 21:28 bedtime — 59 minutes over the 7-day average (7h43) and the most sleep of the window, but also its lowest score. The architecture actually improved: deep nearly doubled to 72 minutes and REM reached a window-high 2h00, with awake at 20. The drag is autonomic — HRV fell to 32 (−8 vs the previous night, −6 under the 38 average) and RHR rose to 57, both the weakest readings of the seven and the expected cost of Tuesday's hack squat (60 min, max HR 154). Morning stress is low at 25. Nights are labeled by the evening they start, so this one sits under Tue 14 (Tuesday–Wednesday). Readiness is moderate: the body took the hours it needed and the depth came back, but the recovery markers haven't. Swim intervals are planned — go, but keep the effort moderate rather than chasing Monday's pace.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Duga i rana noć nakon utorkovog treninga: 8h42 uz ocjenu 73 i lijeganje u 21:28 — 59 minuta iznad 7-dnevnog prosjeka (7h43) i najviše sna u prozoru, ali ujedno i najniža ocjena. Struktura se zapravo popravila: duboki san gotovo se udvostručio na 72 minute, a REM je dosegnuo vrhunac prozora od 2h00, uz 20 minuta budnosti. Teret je autonomni — HRV je pao na 32 (−8 vs prethodna noć, −6 ispod prosjeka od 38), a RHR porastao na 57, oboje najslabije vrijednosti među sedam i očekivana cijena utorkovog hack squata (60 min, maks puls 154). Jutarnji stres nizak je 25. Noći se bilježe prema večeri kojom počinju, pa ova stoji pod Uto 14 (utorak–srijeda). Spremnost je umjerena: tijelo je uzelo sate koji su mu trebali i dubina se vratila, ali pokazatelji oporavka nisu. Planirani su bazenski intervali — idi, ali drži umjeren napor umjesto da juriš ponedjeljkov tempo.
